mapper.sql: CASE WHEN TRUNC(w.work_fdate) - TRUNC(w.work_date) >= 2 THEN 'RISK' WHEN TRUNC(w.work_fdate) - TRUNC(w.work_date) >= 1 THEN 'DELAY' ELSE 'NORMAL' END
FROM "WORK" w JOIN plan p ON w.work_plan = p.plan_id JOIN item i ON p.plan_item = i.item_id LEFT JOIN emp d ON w.work_director = d.emp_id LEFT JOIN emp worker ON w.work_worker = worker.emp_id
mapper.select:
SELECT NVL(SUM(plan_qty), 0) AS totalPlanQty, NVL(SUM(order_qty), 0) AS totalOrderQty, NVL(SUM(prod_qty), 0) AS totalProdQty,
NVL(ROUND( SUM(prod_qty) / NULLIF(SUM(order_qty), 0) * 100, 2 ), 0) AS achievementRate,
NVL(SUM(delay_count), 0) AS delayCount, NVL(SUM(risk_count), 0) AS riskCount
FROM ( SELECT p.plan_id, MAX(NVL(p.plan_fin_qty, 0)) AS plan_qty, SUM(NVL(w.work_order_qty, 0)) AS order_qty, SUM(NVL(w.work_prev_qty, 0)) AS prod_qty,
SUM( CASE WHEN ( CASE WHEN TRUNC(w.work_fdate) - TRUNC(w.work_date) >= 2 THEN 'RISK' WHEN TRUNC(w.work_fdate) - TRUNC(w.work_date) >= 1 THEN 'DELAY' ELSE 'NORMAL' END ) = 'DELAY' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS delay_count,
SUM( CASE WHEN ( CASE WHEN TRUNC(w.work_fdate) - TRUNC(w.work_date) >= 2 THEN 'RISK' WHEN TRUNC(w.work_fdate) - TRUNC(w.work_date) >= 1 THEN 'DELAY' ELSE 'NORMAL' END ) = 'RISK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS risk_count
GROUP BY p.plan_id )

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rnum, base_data.* FROM ( SELECT w.work_id AS "workId", TO_CHAR(w.work_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "workDate",
i.item_id AS "itemId", i.item_name AS "itemName",
NVL(p.plan_fin_qty, 0) AS "planQty", NVL(w.work_order_qty, 0) AS "orderQty", NVL(w.work_prev_qty, 0) AS "prodQty",
CASE WHEN NVL(w.work_order_qty, 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(NVL(w.work_prev_qty, 0) / NULLIF(w.work_order_qty, 0) * 100, 2) END AS "achievementRate",
AS "riskLevel"
FROM "WORK" w JOIN plan p ON w.work_plan = p.plan_id JOIN item i ON p.plan_item = i.item_id LEFT JOIN emp d ON w.work_director = d.emp_id LEFT JOIN emp worker ON w.work_worker = worker.emp_id
WHERE w.work_usage = 'Y' AND w.work_order_qty > 0 AND w.work_fdate IS NOT NULL
AND w.work_date >= TO_DATE(#{search.startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND w.work_date >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24)), -6)
AND w.work_date < TO_DATE(#{search.endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND (
) = #{search.workStatus}
AND TO_CHAR(i.item_type) = #{search.itemType}
AND ( UPPER(w.work_id) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{search.itemKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(w.work_plan) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{search.itemKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(p.plan_id) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{search.itemKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(i.item_id) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{search.itemKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(i.item_name) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{search.itemKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(d.emp_name) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{search.itemKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(worker.emp_name) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{search.itemKeyword} || '%') )
ORDER BY w.work_date DESC, w.work_id DESC ) base_data WHERE ROWNUM <= #{page.endRow} ) WHERE rnum >= #{page.startRow}

SELECT risk_level AS "riskLevel", COUNT(*) AS "riskCount" FROM ( SELECT AS risk_level
) GROUP BY risk_level ORDER BY CASE risk_level WHEN 'RISK' THEN 1 WHEN 'DELAY' THEN 2 WHEN 'NORMAL' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END

SELECT TO_CHAR(w.work_date, 'IYYY') || '-W' || TO_CHAR(w.work_date, 'IW') AS "workDate",
SUM( CASE WHEN TRUNC(w.work_fdate) - TRUNC(w.work_date) >= 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS "riskCount",
SUM( CASE WHEN TRUNC(w.work_fdate) - TRUNC(w.work_date) >= 1 AND TRUNC(w.work_fdate) - TRUNC(w.work_date) < 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS "delayCount"
GROUP BY TO_CHAR(w.work_date, 'IYYY') || '-W' || TO_CHAR(w.work_date, 'IW') ORDER BY TO_CHAR(w.work_date, 'IYYY') || '-W' || TO_CHAR(w.work_date, 'IW')

SELECT DISTINCT TO_CHAR(item_type) AS "code", CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(item_type) = '10' THEN '원자재' WHEN TO_CHAR(item_type) = '20' THEN '반제품' WHEN TO_CHAR(item_type) = '30' THEN '완제품' WHEN TO_CHAR(item_type) = '40' THEN '기타자재' ELSE TO_CHAR(item_type) END AS "name" FROM item WHERE item_type IS NOT NULL ORDER BY "code"

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT NVL(w.work_order_qty, 0) AS "workOrderQty", NVL(w.work_prev_qty, 0) AS "workPrevQty", NVL(w.work_status, 0) AS "workStatus", NVL(p.plan_fin_qty, 0) AS "planFinQty", NVL(p.plan_wp_qty, 0) AS "planWpQty", NVL(i.item_type, 0) AS "itemType",
TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(w.work_date, 'MM')) AS "workMonth", TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(w.work_date, 'D')) AS "workWeekday",
CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(w.work_date, 'MM') IN ('06', '07', '08') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS "summerFlag",
CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(w.work_date, 'MM') IN ('12', '01', '02') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS "winterFlag",
CASE WHEN w.work_order_qty >= 5000 THEN 2 WHEN w.work_order_qty >= 3000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS "qtyRiskScore",
CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(w.work_date, 'MM') = '01' THEN 3 WHEN TO_CHAR(w.work_date, 'MM') IN ('12', '02') THEN 2 WHEN TO_CHAR(w.work_date, 'MM') = '07' THEN 2 WHEN TO_CHAR(w.work_date, 'MM') IN ('06', '08') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS "seasonRiskScore"
ORDER BY w.work_date DESC, w.work_id DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
